BetterClean MVP

Internal lead system for BetterClean website inquiries and future social channel routing.

This app is the first foundation for BetterClean operations: structured lead intake, deterministic scoring, auto-reply preparation, and one internal dashboard instead of scattered inboxes.

Open Lead DashboardView MVP Blueprint

Website

First connected source for structured lead capture.

In progress

Facebook

Planned for page messages and lead ads after website MVP.

Planned

Instagram

Planned for DMs and profile-led quote requests.

Planned

TikTok

Planned for attribution and CTA routing before deeper inbox automation.
